misfits.title: Accidental Adversaries
misfits.description: Two allies each make a locally safe move that quietly harms the other, so each strikes back, and partners become rivals.

misfits.title: Alarm Fatigue
misfits.description: Set alarms to miss no danger and the flood of false ones deadens the responder, so the one true alarm is ignored.

misfits.title: Bad Coin
misfits.description: Good and shoddy pass at the same bar, so the shoddy circulates and the careful work is quietly withdrawn.

misfits.title: Baumol's Cost Disease
misfits.description: A service whose hour cannot be sped up grows costlier forever, its wages tracking sectors that got more productive.

misfits.title: Belt and Braces
misfits.description: Each backup added for safety adds coupling, a shared cause, and shirking, so more redundancy can lower reliability.

misfits.title: Bootleggers and Baptists
misfits.description: A sincere moralist and a quiet profiteer back the same rule for opposite reasons, and a bad law will not be repealed.

misfits.title: Borrowed Immunity
misfits.description: Each skips the shot the herd already covers, so coverage slips below the line and the disease returns.

misfits.title: Chasing the Price
misfits.description: Each grower plants to today's price, but so does every other, so the harvest lands too late, into a glut they all made.

misfits.title: Chesterton's Fence
misfits.description: A safeguard whose purpose everyone has forgotten is cleared away as useless, and the quiet harm it prevented returns.

misfits.title: Closing Ranks
misfits.description: A close, confident team converges on one view and quietly closes ranks against the doubt that would have saved it.

misfits.title: Debt-Deflation
misfits.description: Paying down debt by selling drives prices down, so the fixed debt's real weight rises: the more paid, the more owed.

misfits.title: Dutch Disease
misfits.description: A resource windfall lifts the currency and prices the factories out, so the boom hollows the economy that got it.

misfits.title: Early and Uncounted
misfits.description: A gene favoured early is never billed for its late cost, because too few of the cohort survive to pay it.

misfits.title: Everybody's Business
misfits.description: A decision everyone can see and anyone could own is dropped, because each assumes it is somebody else's to hold.

misfits.title: First Do Harm
misfits.description: A remedy applied in good faith treats the complaint and inflicts a new, separate harm the condition never carried.

misfits.title: Fit to Fail
misfits.description: Selection favours a trait that makes each fitter and the whole less viable, so the population is bred past the brink.

misfits.title: Fixes that Fail
misfits.description: A fix relieves the symptom now, and its delayed side effect worsens the problem, so more of the same fix is applied.

misfits.title: Good Money After Bad
misfits.description: A doomed project is funded past every reason to stop: each gate weighs what was spent, not what is left to gain.

misfits.title: In Its Own Defence
misfits.description: The body's defence escalates correctly against infection, but its weapons wreck the host and amplify past the invader.

misfits.title: Information Cascade
misfits.description: Everyone follows the crowd and swallows their own hint, so the herd locks onto the first few noisy guesses.

misfits.title: It Saved My Life
misfits.description: The overdiagnosed cannot tell rescue from harm, so they credit the test and campaign, and it grows where it harms.

misfits.title: Jevons Paradox
misfits.description: Make a resource go further per unit and total use rises, as cheaper service draws more demand than the saving spared.

misfits.title: Limits to Growth
misfits.description: Growth stalls on a limit, so the engine that made the success is driven harder, when the limit, not the engine, binds.

misfits.title: Metric Fixation
misfits.description: A number chosen to stand for a goal is hit exactly and truthfully, and the goal it stood for quietly dies.

misfits.title: Model Collapse
misfits.description: Each model trained on the last one's output loses the rare cases first, drifting to a bland self-referential mean.

misfits.title: Moral Hazard
misfits.description: Insure a risk and the care taken against it falls, because the one who carries the risk no longer carries the loss.

misfits.title: Moral Licensing
misfits.description: A good deed is banked as moral credit, and the credit buys a later lapse, so the virtue funds the vice and washes out.

misfits.title: More to Stand Still
misfits.description: The dose stops working, so you raise it, and the raise becomes the level you need just to stand where you started.

misfits.title: No Idle Hands
misfits.description: Driving a resource to full use to erase idleness makes the queue behind it swell without bound as the slack runs out.

misfits.title: No One in Charge
misfits.description: A group that refuses leaders does not abolish power but hides it in an informal elite no one can hold to account.

misfits.title: No Way Back Up
misfits.description: The least-mutated class is lost by chance and can't be remade without mixing, so a copied lineage's load only rises.

misfits.title: Nobody Reads It
misfits.description: Reading the terms costs more than it saves, so too few read them to police them, and they drift to the drafter.

misfits.title: Not-Invented-Here
misfits.description: A good idea from outside is spurned for being outside, and the group builds a worse one of its own to keep it theirs.

misfits.title: Not Worth My While
misfits.description: A measure that saves many offers each person almost nothing, so each rationally declines and the shared benefit is lost.

misfits.title: Nothing to Lose
misfits.description: An actor whose harm tops its assets treats the excess as free, so it under-guards and the largest harms go undeterred.

misfits.title: Only the Close Ones
misfits.description: The clear cases settle, so only the toss-ups are tried, so the trial record comes out near even and means little.

misfits.title: Overfitting
misfits.description: A model tuned to fit the sample perfectly learns its noise as signal, so it explains the past and predicts nothing.

misfits.title: Path Dependence
misfits.description: A lead won by accident compounds as each adopter picks what others picked, until a worse standard locks in for good.

misfits.title: Plausible Deniability
misfits.description: A principal wants a deed, won't order it, and arranges not to know it, so when it surfaces the blame cannot reach them.

misfits.title: Pournelle's Iron Law
misfits.description: Those devoted to the organisation win control from those devoted to its mission: control is made of what they tend.

misfits.title: Prevalence-Induced Concept Change
misfits.description: As the real cases grow scarce, the mind widens what counts as the thing, so the problem is never seen to shrink.

misfits.title: Regulatory Capture
misfits.description: A watchdog set to guard the public against an industry comes, in time, to guard the industry against the public.

misfits.title: Rent-Seeking
misfits.description: Real resources are spent competing to capture a transfer rather than to create wealth, so slicing the pie shrinks it.

misfits.title: Rising to Unfit
misfits.description: The best are promoted for mastering a job into a different one they cannot do, and cannot be moved back from.

misfits.title: Safety in Numbers
misfits.description: The crowd confers real safety, so a population thinned past the line loses it and declines faster the fewer remain.

misfits.title: Sandbag
misfits.description: Beat the target and next year's is higher, so everyone hits the number and hides the rest, and no one shows their best.

misfits.title: Saving Face
misfits.description: A courteous team keeps every mistake unspoken, fixing what it can name and never learning what it cannot say.

misfits.title: Second Nature
misfits.description: Know a thing so well you cannot picture not knowing it, so you explain it over the heads of those who don't.

misfits.title: Seed Corn
misfits.description: The quarter's number is hit by eating the seed corn: the present looks strong, and the future pays the bill.

misfits.title: Shifting the Burden
misfits.description: Reach for the quick fix and the capacity for the real cure withers, until the fix is the only thing that still works.

misfits.title: Sick Enough to Spread
misfits.description: Selected only to spread, a parasite settles at the harm that spreads best, not the least, since spread needs harm.

misfits.title: Social Loafing
misfits.description: In a group each pulls a little softer, because effort blends into the pool and no single hand can be seen to slack.

misfits.title: Someone Will Catch Me
misfits.description: The rescue is certain, so no one builds a footing, and the kindness that will always catch you keeps you falling.

misfits.title: The Abstraction Ladder
misfits.description: A report climbs the ladder to the abstract, gaining authority and shedding the specifics that would let it be checked.

misfits.title: The Anticommons
misfits.description: Too many owners each hold a veto over one resource, so it sits idle: anyone can say no, and no one can say yes.

misfits.title: The Arms Race
misfits.description: Each spends more to get ahead, but the prize is rank, so the spending cancels and all stand higher at no one's gain.

misfits.title: The Availability Cascade
misfits.description: A vivid risk retold in public feels likelier, so alarm outruns the evidence and the guard tracks salience not size.

misfits.title: The Balloon Effect
misfits.description: Squeeze a banned trade on one patch and it bulges to the next, so local wins move the trade rather than cut it.

misfits.title: The Bank Run
misfits.description: Each saver runs because he fears the others will, so a solvent bank is felled by the very fear that it might fail.

misfits.title: The Beauty Contest
misfits.description: Paid to guess what the room will guess, price tracks opinion about opinion and floats free of a thing's worth.

misfits.title: The Best on Paper
misfits.description: Pick the highest-scoring option and you pick the one whose estimate ran luckiest, so it tends to disappoint.

misfits.title: The Bigger Picture
misfits.description: A trend in every subgroup reverses once the groups are pooled, so the same honest data backs opposite calls.

misfits.title: The Bounce
misfits.description: Punish the slump and it recovers, praise the streak and it falls, so we learn that toughness works and praise is poison.

misfits.title: The Brittle Optimum
misfits.description: Each slice of slack is idle waste in calm, so it is trimmed away, until the leanest system shatters on the first shock.

misfits.title: The Bullwhip Effect
misfits.description: A small wobble in demand grows link by link up the chain, each ordering to cover itself, into a wild swing at the top.

misfits.title: The Bus Factor
misfits.description: A team runs fast on the one person who knows everything, until the day they are gone and the knowledge with them.

misfits.title: The Cargo Cult
misfits.description: A team copies the exact form of a proven success, and no cargo lands, because the form was never what made it work.

misfits.title: The Cobra Effect
misfits.description: A bounty set to reduce a problem is farmed instead, so the reward breeds the very thing it pays to remove.

misfits.title: The Colour of the Bike Shed
misfits.description: A meeting scrutinises the trivial thing everyone understands and waves through the vital thing no one does.

misfits.title: The Common Object
misfits.description: A shared object each group reads its own way seems to coordinate them, so the divergence hides until the work is joined.

misfits.title: The Commons
misfits.description: Everyone takes a fair share of the shared field, and the field goes bare, because the cost of one more is split by all.

misfits.title: The Dead Sea Effect
misfits.description: When a team sours, the ablest leave first because they can, so talent evaporates and the less mobile settle and stay.

misfits.title: The Decision Travels
misfits.description: A correct decision travels every station of the chain, and no one measures it against the person who must live with it.

misfits.title: The Dilbert Principle
misfits.description: The one who cannot do the work is promoted out of it, so the ranks that lead fill with those who failed at it.

misfits.title: The Dollar Auction
misfits.description: A dollar goes to the top bidder and the runner-up pays too, so each rational raise carries both past the prize to ruin.

misfits.title: The Done Thing
misfits.description: Organisations adopt the recognised form for standing, so a field locks onto one shape chosen for legitimacy, not fit.

misfits.title: The Double Bind
misfits.description: Two demands clash at different levels, and one may not obey both, name the clash, or leave, so every answer is wrong.

misfits.title: The Driest Wells
misfits.description: Care goes where it pays and where the ground is easy, so the well is driest exactly where the thirst runs deepest.

misfits.title: The Empty Seat
misfits.description: An aid right so often that deferring is rational lulls the watch, so the operator follows its rare wrong output.

misfits.title: The Extra Road
misfits.description: A road added to ease the jam draws everyone onto it, and the whole network slows: more capacity, less flow.

misfits.title: The False Trade-Off
misfits.description: Select on the sum of two unrelated things, and among the chosen they look opposed: a trade-off the world never had.

misfits.title: The File Drawer
misfits.description: Only the studies that worked reach the record, so science reads surer than it is, its failures unseen in the drawer.

misfits.title: The Filter Bubble
misfits.description: Each click for the agreeable teaches the feed to show more of it, so exposure narrows and the common ground fragments.

misfits.title: The Firefighter's Medal
misfits.description: Prevention is invisible and the dramatic save gets the medal, so effort flows to firefighting and the fires never stop.

misfits.title: The Front
misfits.description: Each shows the resolved version and edits the raw away, so the room holds only the finished, never the burning thing.

misfits.title: The Frozen Middle
misfits.description: A bold change dies in the middle: softened on the way down, and the hard truth smoothed on the way up.

misfits.title: The Good Move
misfits.description: A good answer arrives first and works, so the search stops, and the better one in plain sight is never found.

misfits.title: The Head Start
misfits.description: An early lead attracts the credit and resources that make the next lead, so small head starts compound into dominance.

misfits.title: The High-Water Mark
misfits.description: Each crisis lifts the spending to meet it, and when the crisis passes the spending stays, so the floor only climbs.

misfits.title: The Hollow Word
misfits.description: A word keeps circulating after the practice it named has gone, so the field speaks the old language and does the new.

misfits.title: The Horizon Problem
misfits.description: Every plan ends at its instrument's edge, so what lies past carries no cost and casts no shadow until it arrives.

misfits.title: The Identified Patient
misfits.description: A group lands its strain on one member who turns symptomatic, so treating them keeps shut the rift that made them ill.

misfits.title: The Illusion of Shared Understanding
misfits.description: Each receiver fills a message with their own meaning and thinks it shared, so one instruction runs several ways at once.

misfits.title: The Iron Triangle
misfits.description: A committee, an agency, and a lobby supply what the others need, so a closed ring runs the policy and the outside pays.

misfits.title: The Irony of Automation
misfits.description: Automating the routine rusts and disengages the operator, so the rare failure lands on a hand too cold to catch it.

misfits.title: The Last Layer
misfits.description: A society answers every problem with more complexity, until the complexity it lives by costs more than it yields.

misfits.title: The Law of the Instrument
misfits.description: The one tool a hand has mastered reshapes every problem into the shape it can strike, and trims off the rest.

misfits.title: The Leadership Script
misfits.description: Leadership becomes a way of speaking, so promotion flows to the fluent over the doer and the sound becomes the mark.

misfits.title: The Letter of the Law
misfits.description: A powerful optimiser maximises the objective to the letter, taking the route that maxes the reward and misses the goal.

misfits.title: The Lie of the Land
misfits.description: A cue that once meant good habitat still fires after the ground goes bad, so settlers fill the sink, not the source.

misfits.title: The Load It Always Carried
misfits.description: Every cycle passes every check, yet the increments sum until the part fractures under the load it always carried.

misfits.title: The Lowest Bar
misfits.description: A mobile base sits where the standard costs least, so each jurisdiction lowers its own and all race to the bottom.

misfits.title: The Loyalty Trap
misfits.description: Loyalty keeps the member from leaving and from complaining, so a declining body gets no signal and slides uncorrected.

misfits.title: The Market for Lemons
misfits.description: Buyers cannot tell good from bad, so they pay the average, which drives the good out and leaves the market to lemons.

misfits.title: The Mirror
misfits.description: Teams ship a system shaped like their own org chart, so the software's seams fall exactly where the teams don't talk.

misfits.title: The New Normal
misfits.description: Each small deviation is tolerated once and becomes the standard, so the line of acceptable creeps until it fails.

misfits.title: The Ninth Woman
misfits.description: More people are added to a late project to speed it up, and the ramp-up and cross-talk make it later still.

misfits.title: The Open Cage
misfits.description: Taught that nothing you do matters, you stop trying, and go on not trying once the cage is open and effort would work.

misfits.title: The Paper Trail
misfits.description: Each act is made defensible, not effective, so paper piles up, the goal is missed, and the failure is nobody's fault.

misfits.title: The Paradox of Thrift
misfits.description: All save more against hard times, so all spend less, so all earn less, and the nation saves less by trying to save more.

misfits.title: The Peace It Keeps
misfits.description: A body holds its cells in a truce, and one of them, rewarded for winning, undoes the whole it is a part of.

misfits.title: The Permission of the Emergency
misfits.description: A crisis grants the leave to stop that ordinary rest never gets, so time is found for the disaster, never for the bath.

misfits.title: The Planning Fallacy
misfits.description: A task estimated from its own smooth plan is promised too soon, then beaten by the small surprises no plan can name.

misfits.title: The Proxy
misfits.description: Unable to see you, the market prices you by your group's average, and the discount it sets makes that average come true.

misfits.title: The Shirky Principle
misfits.description: The body built to cure a problem comes to depend on it, so it solves just enough to stay needed, never enough to end.

misfits.title: The Simpler Lever
misfits.description: Each simplification of the regulator reads as better governed, until it commands too few responses to hold the outcome.

misfits.title: The Sort
misfits.description: Mild preferences about who lives nearby tip, past a threshold, into a stark segregation no one chose.

misfits.title: The Spent Margin
misfits.description: A safety measure hands a margin; the driver spends it back as risk, so the gain shrinks and moves to the exposed.

misfits.title: The Stag Hunt
misfits.description: All prefer the stag that needs everyone, but each fears another takes a hare, so all take hares and the stag walks free.

misfits.title: The Straight Rows
misfits.description: To govern a place the centre makes it legible, and the grid it imposes clears the local knowledge that made it work.

misfits.title: The Streetlight Effect
misfits.description: The answer lies in the dark, so the search works the lit patch, where looking is easy, and takes what it finds for it.

misfits.title: The Success Trap
misfits.description: A firm does everything right, and is undone from below by the one market its own discipline was built to refuse.

misfits.title: The Survivors
misfits.description: You study the survivors and armor the bullet holes, because the planes hit elsewhere never came back to be counted.

misfits.title: The Trip to Abilene
misfits.description: A group agrees its way into a choice no member wanted, each misreading the others' assent for a wish it lacked.

misfits.title: The Tyranny of Small Decisions
misfits.description: Each small choice is rational and free, yet their sum is an outcome no one chose, since nothing ever decides the whole.

misfits.title: The Tyranny of the Urgent
misfits.description: Each task that shouts a deadline gets done first, so the important work that never shouts is deferred and never done.

misfits.title: The Unmarked Edge
misfits.description: Cost and effort push the working point toward a safety edge no one can see, so the system drifts across it step by step.

misfits.title: The Winning Bid
misfits.description: In a common-value auction the bidder who most overestimates wins, so to win is to have overpaid.

misfits.title: Time Inconsistency
misfits.description: A promise best made today is best broken tomorrow, so no one acts on it, and good outcomes need a hand tied in advance.

misfits.title: Vetocracy
misfits.description: So many actors can block a decision that none can be made, and each veto is a real check, so the system acts on nothing.

misfits.title: Watermelon Reporting
misfits.description: Green on the skin, red in the flesh: the red never reaches a seat that can act, because every rung is paid to move on.

misfits.title: Whoever Asks Last
misfits.description: Every voter is rational and sincere, yet the majority cycles, so whoever sets the order of the votes decides.
